metrics.name: TotalReturn
metrics.calculation: 总收益率 = (最终价值 - 初始价值) / 初始价值

metrics.name: AnnualizedReturn
metrics.calculation: 年化收益率 = (1 + 总收益率)^(return_ann_factor/天数) - 1

metrics.name: AverageDailyReturn
metrics.calculation: 日均收益率 = 总收益率 / 交易天数

metrics.name: AvgPositiveReturn
metrics.calculation: 平均正收益率 = 所有正收益的平均值

metrics.name: AvgNegativeReturn
metrics.calculation: 平均负收益率 = 所有负收益的平均值

metrics.name: AvgReturnRatio
metrics.calculation: 平均盈亏比 = 平均正收益率 / 平均负收益率

metrics.name: TotalPositiveReturn
metrics.calculation: 总累计盈利 = 所有正收益的总和

metrics.name: TotalNegativeReturn
metrics.calculation: 总累计亏损 = 所有负收益的总和

metrics.name: TotalReturnRatio
metrics.calculation: 累计盈亏比 = 总累计盈利 / 总累计亏损

metrics.name: MedianDailyReturn
metrics.calculation: 日中位收益率 = 所有日收益率的中位数

metrics.name: Volatility
metrics.calculation: 波动率 = 收益率的标准差

metrics.name: AnnualizedVolatility
metrics.calculation: 年化波动率 = 波动率 * sqrt(risk_ann_factor)

metrics.name: MeanAbsoluteDeviation
metrics.calculation: 平均绝对偏差 = 平均每期收益率距离均值的绝对值, 比标准差更不受极端值影响

metrics.name: ReturnRange
metrics.label_zh: 收益率范围, 也称为极差
metrics.calculation: 收益率范围 = 收益率的最大值 - 收益率的最小值

metrics.name: RescaledRange
metrics.calculation: 标准化极差 = (收益率的最大值 - 收益率的最小值) / 波动率

metrics.name: MaxGain
metrics.calculation: 最大收益 = 收益率的最大值

metrics.name: MaxLoss
metrics.calculation: 最大亏损 = 收益率的最小值

metrics.name: MaxDrawDown
metrics.calculation: 最大回撤 = (峰值 - 谷值) / 峰值

metrics.name: MaxDrawDownDays
metrics.calculation: 最大回撤天数 = 回撤开始到谷底的交易日天数

metrics.name: ReturnDrawDownRatio
metrics.calculation: 收益率回撤比 = 总收益率 / 最大回撤

metrics.name: DrawDownSlope
metrics.calculation: 回撤斜率 = 最大回撤幅度 / 回撤所用时间

metrics.name: UlcerIndex
metrics.label_zh: 溃疡指数 (衡量最大回撤深度和持续时间的指标)
metrics.calculation: 溃疡指数 = 所有 draw down 的均方根（RMS）

metrics.name: MartinRatio
metrics.label_zh: 马丁比率 (绩效趋势比率), 衡量趋势的可复制性
metrics.calculation: 马丁比率 = 年化收益率 / 溃疡指数

metrics.name: SharpeRatio
metrics.calculation: 夏普比率 = (累计收益率 - 无风险收益) / 投资组合波动率

metrics.name: AnnualizedSharpeRatio
metrics.calculation: 年化夏普比率 = 夏普比率 * sqrt(年交易天数)

metrics.name: ReturnVolatilityRatio
metrics.calculation: 收益率波动率比 = 总收益率 / 波动率

metrics.name: DownsideVolatility
metrics.calculation: 下行波动率 = 负收益率的标准差

metrics.name: UpsideVolatility
metrics.calculation: 上行波动率 = 正收益率的标准差

metrics.name: VolatilitySkew
metrics.calculation: 波动率偏度 = (上行波动率 - 下行波动率) / 总波动率

metrics.name: VolatilityRatio
metrics.label_zh: 波动率比, 也叫 上行潜在比率
metrics.calculation: 波动率比 = 上行波动率 / 下行波动率

metrics.name: SortinoRatio
metrics.calculation: 索提诺比率 = (累计收益率 - 无风险收益率) / 下行波动率

metrics.name: GainConsistency
metrics.calculation: 收益趋势一致性 = 盈利日的标准差(上行波动率) / 盈利日的平均收益(平均正收益率)

metrics.name: LossConsistency
metrics.calculation: 亏损趋势一致性 = 亏损日的标准差(下行波动率) / 亏损日的平均亏损(平均负收益率)

metrics.name: WinningRatio
metrics.calculation: 胜率 = 盈利交易次数(不含0) / 总交易次数

metrics.name: LosingRatio
metrics.calculation: 亏损率 = 亏损交易次数(不含0) / 总交易次数

metrics.name: ReturnSkewness
metrics.calculation: 收益率偏度 = 收益率分布的偏度

metrics.name: ReturnKurtosis
metrics.calculation: 收益率峰度 = 收益率分布的峰度

metrics.name: VaR-99
metrics.calculation: 99% VaR = 在99%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的最大损失

metrics.name: VaR-95
metrics.calculation: 95% VaR = 在95%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的最大损失

metrics.name: VaR-90
metrics.calculation: 90% VaR = 在90%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的最大损失

metrics.name: VaRSharpe-95
metrics.label_zh: 基于 95% VaR 计算夏普比率
metrics.calculation: 基于 95% VaR 计算夏普比率 = (投资组合收益率 - 无风险收益率) / 95% VaR

metrics.name: VaRModified-99
metrics.calculation: 99% 修正VaR = 在传统正态 VaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: VaRModified-95
metrics.calculation: 95% 修正VaR = 在传统正态 VaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: VaRModified-90
metrics.calculation: 90% 修正VaR = 在传统正态 VaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: VaRModifiedSharpe-95
metrics.label_zh: 基于 95% 修正VaR 计算夏普比率
metrics.calculation: 基于 95% 修正VaR 计算夏普比率 = (投资组合收益率 - 无风险收益率) / 95% 修正VaR

metrics.name: CVaR-99
metrics.calculation: 99% CVaR = 在99%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的平均损失

metrics.name: CVaR-95
metrics.calculation: 95% CVaR = 在95%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的平均损失

metrics.name: CVaR-90
metrics.calculation: 90% CVaR = 在90%的置信水平下，投资组合可能的平均损失

metrics.name: CVaRModified-99
metrics.calculation: 99% 修正CVaR = 在传统正态 CVaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: CVaRModified-95
metrics.calculation: 95% 修正CVaR = 在传统正态 CVaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: CVaRModified-90
metrics.calculation: 90% 修正CVaR = 在传统正态 CVaR 的基础上，使用 Cornish-Fisher 展开修正尾部概率

metrics.name: CVaRSharpe-95
metrics.label_zh: 基于 95% CVaR 计算夏普比率
metrics.calculation: 基于 95% CVaR 计算夏普比率 = (投资组合收益率 - 无风险收益率) / 95% CVaR

metrics.name: CVaRModifiedSharpe-95
metrics.label_zh: 基于 95% 修正CVaR 计算夏普比率
metrics.calculation: 基于 95% 修正CVaR 计算夏普比率 = (投资组合收益率 - 无风险收益率) / 95% 修正CVaR

metrics.name: Percentile-1
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前1%分位数 (一般是极端亏损部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: Percentile-99
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前99%分位数 (一般是极端盈利部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: Percentile-5
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前5%分位数 (一般是极端亏损部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: Percentile-95
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前95%分位数 (一般是极端盈利部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: Percentile-10
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前10%分位数 (一般是极端亏损部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: Percentile-90
metrics.label_zh: 所有收益率前90%分位数 (一般是极端盈利部分)
metrics.calculation: 所有收益率的分位数

metrics.name: PercentileWin-95
metrics.calculation: 只考虑正收益率的分位数

metrics.name: PercentileLoss-95
metrics.label_zh: 负收益率取绝对值后, 前5%分位数
metrics.calculation: 只考虑负收益率的分位数

metrics.name: PercentileWin-90
metrics.calculation: 只考虑正收益率的分位数

metrics.name: PercentileLoss-90
metrics.label_zh: 负收益率取绝对值后, 前10%分位数
metrics.calculation: 只考虑负收益率的分位数

metrics.name: TailRatio-90
metrics.label_zh: 尾部比率, 极端正收益与极端负收益的比值
metrics.calculation: TailRatio-90 = PercentileWin-90 / PercentileLoss-90

metrics.name: TailRatio-95
metrics.label_zh: 尾部比率, 极端正收益与极端负收益的比值
metrics.calculation: TailRatio-95 = PercentileWin-95 / PercentileLoss-95

metrics.name: NewHighRatio
metrics.calculation: 净值新高比率 = 净值创新高的交易日数 / 总交易日数

metrics.name: CrossProductRatio-1
metrics.label_zh: 交叉乘积比率 (基于单日收益统计)
metrics.calculation: 交叉乘积比率 = (WW * LL) / (WL * LW)

metrics.name: CrossProductRatio-5
metrics.label_zh: 交叉乘积比率 (基于5日收益统计)
metrics.calculation: 交叉乘积比率 = (WW * LL) / (WL * LW)

metrics.name: CrossProductRatio-10
metrics.label_zh: 交叉乘积比率 (基于10日收益统计)
metrics.calculation: 交叉乘积比率 = (WW * LL) / (WL * LW)

metrics.name: HurstExponent
metrics.calculation: 赫斯特指数 = 对净值构造时间序列，进行 R/S 分析

metrics.name: OmegaRatio
metrics.calculation: 欧米茄比率 = 更全面的夏普比率扩展版本（考虑全部分布）

metrics.name: ReturnDistributionIntegral
metrics.calculation: 收益分布积分 = Omega Ratio 的分子部分

metrics.name: ReturnSlope
metrics.calculation: 收益斜率 = 收益率拟合直线的 slope

metrics.name: KRatio
metrics.label_zh: K比率 (绩效趋势比率), 衡量趋势的可复制性
metrics.calculation: K比率 = 净值的 log 值拟合直线的 slope / 标准差

metrics.name: SortinoSkewness
metrics.calculation: 索提诺偏度 = 类似 Skewness，但只考虑负收益部分的偏度（衡量尾部亏损分布）

metrics.name: NetEquitySlope
metrics.label_zh: 净值增长斜率 (代表了净值随时间的平均上升速度)
metrics.calculation: 净值增长斜率 = 净值的 log 值拟合直线的 slope

metrics.name: EquitySmoothness
metrics.label_zh: 净值平滑度 (衡量策略净值序列与其线性拟合值之间的拟合程度)
metrics.calculation: 净值平滑度 = 净值的 log 值拟合曲线的 R^2

metrics.name: VolAvg
metrics.calculation: 平均成交量 = 过去N天的平均成交量

metrics.name: VolSlope
metrics.calculation: 成交量斜率 = 过去N天的成交量拟合直线的 slope

metrics.name: VolVolatility
metrics.calculation: 成交量波动率 = 过去N天的成交量标准差

metrics.name: MaxHigh
metrics.calculation: 最高价 = 过去N天的最高价

metrics.name: MinLow
metrics.calculation: 最低价 = 过去N天的最低价

metrics.name: HLDiff
metrics.calculation: High-Low 差值 = 过去N天的最高价与最低价之差

metrics.name: AvgHigh
metrics.calculation: High 平均值 = 过去N天的最高价平均值

metrics.name: AvgLow
metrics.calculation: Low 平均值 = 过去N天的最低价平均值

metrics.name: PriceSigma
metrics.label_zh: 过去N天收盘价的滚动标准差
metrics.calculation: PriceSigma = 收盘价的滚动标准差

metrics.name: CloseMA
metrics.calculation: CloseMA = 收盘价的N日移动平均值

metrics.name: CloseMADiff
metrics.label_zh: N日移动平均收盘价与当前收盘价的差值
metrics.calculation: CloseMADiff = CloseMA - Close

metrics.name: BollUp-2
metrics.calculation: 布林带上轨 = N日移动平均收盘价 + 2 * N日移动标准差

metrics.name: BollUpDiff-2
metrics.label_zh: bolling 上轨与收盘价之差
metrics.calculation: BollUpDiff = BollUp - Close

metrics.name: BollDo-2
metrics.calculation: 布林带下轨 = N日移动平均收盘价 - 2 * N日移动标准差

metrics.name: BollDoDiff-2
metrics.label_zh: bolling 下轨与收盘价之差
metrics.calculation: BollDoDiff = BollDo - Close

metrics.name: BollUpDo-2
metrics.calculation: BollUpDo = BollUp - BollDo，2 倍标准差上下轨之间的距离

metrics.name: BollUp-3
metrics.calculation: 布林带上轨 = N日移动平均收盘价 + 3 * N日移动标准差

metrics.name: BollUpDiff-3
metrics.label_zh: bolling 上轨与收盘价之差
metrics.calculation: BollUpDiff = BollUp - Close

metrics.name: BollDo-3
metrics.calculation: 布林带下轨 = N日移动平均收盘价 - 3 * N日移动标准差

metrics.name: BollDoDiff-3
metrics.label_zh: bolling 下轨与收盘价之差
metrics.calculation: BollDoDiff = BollDo - Close

metrics.name: BollUpDo-3
metrics.calculation: BollUpDo = BollUp - BollDo，3 倍标准差上下轨之间的距离

metrics.name: L
metrics.label_zh: 过去N天的最低价 (KDJ相关指标)
metrics.calculation: L = Min(N天最低价)

metrics.name: H
metrics.label_zh: 过去N天的最高价 (KDJ相关指标)
metrics.calculation: H = Max(N天最高价)

metrics.name: RSV
metrics.calculation: RSV = (当前收盘价 - 最近N天最低价) / (最近N天最高价 - 最近N天最低价) * 100

metrics.name: KDJ-K-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 K 值
metrics.calculation: K = RSV 的指数移动平均值

metrics.name: KDJ-D-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 D 值
metrics.calculation: D = K 的指数移动平均值

metrics.name: KDJ-J-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 J 值

metrics.name: KDJ-KD-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 K 值与 D 值之差
metrics.calculation: KDJ-KD = K - D

metrics.name: KDJ-KJ-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 K 值与 J 值之差
metrics.calculation: KDJ-KJ = K - J

metrics.name: KDJ-DJ-3
metrics.label_zh: KDJ 指标的 D 值与 J 值之差
metrics.calculation: KDJ-DJ = D - J

metrics.name: EMA
metrics.label_zh: N日指数移动平均收盘价 (MACD相关指标)
metrics.calculation: EMA = 收盘价的指数移动平均值

metrics.name: EMADiff
metrics.label_zh: N日指数移动平均收盘价与收盘价之差
metrics.calculation: EMADiff = EMA - Close

metrics.name: VolMA
metrics.calculation: VolMA = 成交量的N日移动平均值

metrics.name: VolMADiff
metrics.label_zh: N日移动平均成交量与当前成交量之差
metrics.calculation: VolMADiff = VolMA - Vol

metrics.name: RSI
metrics.label_zh: RSI 指标 (相对强弱指数)
metrics.calculation: RSI = 100 - 100/RS;  RS = N天内上涨的平均收益 / N天内下跌的平均收益

metrics.name: OBV
metrics.calculation: OBV = 今日收盘价>昨日收盘价⇒OBV+今日成交量; 今日收盘价<昨日收盘价⇒OBV-今日成交量; 今日收盘价=昨日收盘价⇒OBV不变

metrics.name: MAOBV
metrics.calculation: OBV 指标的移动平均

metrics.name: MAOBVDiff
metrics.label_zh: OBV 指标的移动平均与 当前 OBV 指标之差
metrics.calculation: MAOBVDiff = MAOBV - OBV

metrics.name: PVT
metrics.label_zh: PVT 指标 (量价趋势指标)
metrics.calculation: PVT = 昨日PVT + 当日成交量 x (今日收盘价 - 昨日收盘价) / 昨日收盘价

metrics.name: MAPVT
metrics.calculation: PVT 指标的移动平均

metrics.name: MAPVTDiff
metrics.label_zh: PVT 指标的移动平均与 当前 PVT 指标之差
metrics.calculation: MAPVTDiff = MAPVT - PVT

metrics.name: MTM
metrics.calculation: MTM = 当前收盘价 - N天前收盘价

metrics.name: MTMMA-3
metrics.calculation: MTMMA = MTM 的 3 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MTMMADiff-3
metrics.label_zh: MTMMA 与 当前 MTM 的差值
metrics.calculation: MTMMADiff = MTMMA - MTM

metrics.name: MTMMA-6
metrics.calculation: MTMMA = MTM 的 6 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MTMMADiff-6
metrics.label_zh: MTMMA 与 当前 MTM 的差值
metrics.calculation: MTMMADiff = MTMMA - MTM

metrics.name: MTMMA-10
metrics.calculation: MTMMA = MTM 的 10 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MTMMADiff-10
metrics.label_zh: MTMMA 与 当前 MTM 的差值
metrics.calculation: MTMMADiff = MTMMA - MTM

metrics.name: TRIX
metrics.label_zh: TRIX 指标 (三重指数平滑移动平均)
metrics.calculation: TRIX = 三重 EMA 的单期变化率 * 100

metrics.name: MATRIX-3
metrics.calculation: MATRIX = TRIX 的 3 日移动平均

metrics.name: MATRIXDiff-3
metrics.label_zh: TRIX 移动平均与当前 TRIX 的差值
metrics.calculation: MATRIXDiff = MATRIX - TRIX

metrics.name: MATRIX-5
metrics.calculation: MATRIX = TRIX 的 5 日移动平均

metrics.name: MATRIXDiff-5
metrics.label_zh: TRIX 移动平均与当前 TRIX 的差值
metrics.calculation: MATRIXDiff = MATRIX - TRIX

metrics.name: PSY
metrics.label_zh: PSY 指标 (心理线 Psychological Line)
metrics.calculation: PSY = 过去N天上涨天数 / 过去N天交易日数

metrics.name: MAPSY-3
metrics.calculation: MAPSY = PSY的N日移动平均值

metrics.name: MAPSYDiff-3
metrics.label_zh: 心理线的移动均线 与 当前 PSY 的差值
metrics.calculation: MAPSYDiff = MAPSY - PSY

metrics.name: MAPSY-6
metrics.calculation: MAPSY = PSY的N日移动平均值

metrics.name: MAPSYDiff-6
metrics.label_zh: 心理线的移动均线 与 当前 PSY 的差值
metrics.calculation: MAPSYDiff = MAPSY - PSY

metrics.name: CCI
metrics.calculation: CCI简化 = (TP - MA) / (0.015 * MD)

metrics.name: CR
metrics.label_zh: CR 指标 (现价能量强度指标)
metrics.calculation: CR = N日 sum(max(0, H - 昨日中间价)) / sum(max(0, 昨日中间价 - L)) * 100

metrics.name: MACR-10-5
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天
metrics.calculation: CR指标的移动平均 = CR的10日移动平均后移5天

metrics.name: MACRDiff-10-5
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天 与 当前CR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MACRDiff = MACR - CR

metrics.name: MACR-20-9
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天
metrics.calculation: CR指标的移动平均 = CR的20日移动平均后移9天

metrics.name: MACRDiff-20-9
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天 与 当前CR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MACRDiff = MACR - CR

metrics.name: MACR-40-17
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天
metrics.calculation: CR指标的移动平均 = CR的40日移动平均后移17天

metrics.name: MACRDiff-40-17
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天 与 当前CR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MACRDiff = MACR - CR

metrics.name: MACR-62-28
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天
metrics.calculation: CR指标的移动平均 = CR的62日移动平均后移28天

metrics.name: MACRDiff-62-28
metrics.label_zh: CR指标的N移动平均往后移动M天 与 当前CR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MACRDiff = MACR - CR

metrics.name: VR
metrics.label_zh: VR 指标 (成交量变异率)
metrics.calculation: VR = (上涨日成交量 + 0.5 * 平盘日成交量) / (下跌日成交量 + 0.5 * 平盘日成交量) * 100

metrics.name: MAVR-3
metrics.calculation: VR = VR 的 3 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MAVRDiff-3
metrics.label_zh: VR的移动平均 与 当前VR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MAVRDiff = MAVR - VR

metrics.name: MAVR-6
metrics.calculation: MAVR = VR 的 6 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MAVRDiff-6
metrics.label_zh: VR的移动平均 与 当前VR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MAVRDiff = MAVR - VR

metrics.name: MAVR-12
metrics.calculation: MAVR = VR 的 12 日移动平均值

metrics.name: MAVRDiff-12
metrics.label_zh: VR的移动平均 与 当前VR指标之差
metrics.calculation: MAVRDiff = MAVR - VR

metrics.name: AR
metrics.calculation: AR = N日 sum(H - O) / sum(O - L) * 100

metrics.name: BR
metrics.calculation: BR = N日 sum(max(0, H - 昨收)) / sum(max(0, 昨收 - L)) * 100

metrics.name: BRARDiff
metrics.calculation: BRARDiff = BR - AR

metrics.name: ARDiff-180
metrics.calculation: ARDiff-180 = AR - 180

metrics.name: BIAS
metrics.calculation: BIAS = (当前收盘价 - N日均线) / N日均线 * 100%

metrics.name: MABIAS-5
metrics.calculation: MABIAS-5 = BIAS的5日移动均值

metrics.name: MABIASDiff-5
metrics.label_zh: 乖离率移动均值 与 当前 BIAS 之差
metrics.calculation: MABIASDiff = MABIAS - BIAS

metrics.name: MABIAS-10
metrics.calculation: MABIAS-10 = BIAS 的 10 日移动均值

metrics.name: MABIASDiff-10
metrics.label_zh: 乖离率移动均值 与 当前 BIAS 之差
metrics.calculation: MABIASDiff = MABIAS - BIAS

metrics.name: TR
metrics.calculation: TR = Max(当前高价 - 当前低价, 当前高价 - 昨日收盘价, 当前低价 - 昨日收盘价)

metrics.name: PDI
metrics.calculation: PDI = 平滑(+DM) / 平滑(TR) * 100%

metrics.name: MDI
metrics.calculation: MDI = 平滑(-DM) / 平滑(TR) * 100%

metrics.name: PDIMDIDiff
metrics.calculation: PDIMDIDiff = PDI - MDI

metrics.name: ADX-6
metrics.calculation: ADX = 平滑 [(PDI - MDI) / (PDI + MDI)] * 100%

metrics.name: ADXR-6-6
metrics.calculation: ADXR-6-6 = (ADX-6 + 6天前的ADX-6) / 2

metrics.name: ADXRDiff-6-6
metrics.label_zh: ADX的平滑值 与 ADX 之差
metrics.calculation: ADXRDiff = ADXR - ADX

metrics.name: ADXR-6-14
metrics.calculation: ADXR-6-14 = (ADX-6 + 14天前的ADX-6) / 2

metrics.name: ADXRDiff-6-14
metrics.label_zh: ADX的平滑值 与 ADX 之差
metrics.calculation: ADXRDiff = ADXR - ADX

metrics.name: DKX
metrics.calculation: DKX = B的滑动加权平均; B=(3⋅C + H + L + O) / 6

metrics.name: DKXDiff
metrics.label_zh: DKX 与 当前收盘价的差值
metrics.calculation: DKXDiff = DKX - Close

metrics.name: MADKX-5
metrics.calculation: MADKX-5 = DKX 的 5 日移动平均

metrics.name: MADKXDiff-5
metrics.label_zh: DKX的移动平均 与 DKX 的差值
metrics.calculation: MADKXDiff = MADKX - DKX

metrics.name: MADKX-10
metrics.calculation: MADKX-10 = DKX 的 10 日移动平均

metrics.name: MADKXDiff-10
metrics.label_zh: DKX的移动平均 与 DKX 的差值
metrics.calculation: MADKXDiff = MADKX - DKX

metrics.name: MADKX-15
metrics.calculation: MADKX-15 = DKX 的 15 日移动平均

metrics.name: MADKXDiff-15
metrics.label_zh: DKX的移动平均 与 DKX 的差值
metrics.calculation: MADKXDiff = MADKX - DKX

not_executable_config_entries.name: 相对历史收益指标 ReturnZScore_2m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前平均收益相对近2个月收益的 Z 分数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率Z分数 = (当前平均收益 - 近2个月平均收益) / 近2个月标准差
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnZScore_6m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前平均收益相对近半年收益的 Z 分数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率Z分数 = (当前平均收益 - 近半年平均收益) / 近半年标准差
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnZScore_1y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前平均收益相对近1年收益的 Z 分数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率Z分数 = (当前平均收益 - 近1年平均收益) / 近1年标准差
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnZScore_2y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前平均收益相对近2年收益的 Z 分数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率Z分数 = (当前平均收益 - 近2年平均收益) / 近2年标准差
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnPercentile_2m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前收益率相对近2个月收益的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2个月的同类收益率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnPercentile_6m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前收益率相对近6个月收益的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2个月的同类收益率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnPercentile_1y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前收益率相对近1年收益的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率分位数 = 当前收益率在近1年的同类收益率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ReturnPercentile_2y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前收益率相对近2年收益的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 收益率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2年的同类收益率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: AverageDeviationReturn_2m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 相较近2月收益均线偏离率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 均线偏离率 = (当前收益率均值 - 近2月收益均值) / 近2月收益均值
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: AverageDeviationReturn_6m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 相较近6月收益均线偏离率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 均线偏离率 = (当前收益率均值 - 近6月收益均值) / 近6月收益均值
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: AverageDeviationReturn_1y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 相较近1年收益均线偏离率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 均线偏离率 = (当前收益率均值 - 近1年收益均值) / 近1年收益均值
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: AverageDeviationReturn_2y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 相较近2年收益均线偏离率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 均线偏离率 = (当前收益率均值 - 近2年收益均值) / 近2年收益均值
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: 相对历史风险指标 VolatilityRollingRatio_2m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相较近2个月波动率的滚动比率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率滚动比率 = 当前波动率 / 近2个月波动率 (值 > 1 表示近期强于长期，< 1 则反之)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityRollingRatio_6m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相较近6个月波动率的滚动比率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率滚动比率 = 当前波动率 / 近6个月波动率 (值 > 1 表示近期强于长期，< 1 则反之)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityRollingRatio_1y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相较近1年波动率的滚动比率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率滚动比率 = 当前波动率 / 近1年波动率 (值 > 1 表示近期强于长期，< 1 则反之)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityRollingRatio_2y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相较近2年波动率的滚动比率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率滚动比率 = 当前波动率 / 近2年波动率 (值 > 1 表示近期强于长期，< 1 则反之)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityPercentile_2m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相对近2个月波动率的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2个月的同类波动率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityPercentile_6m
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相对近6个月波动率的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2个月的同类波动率中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityPercentile_1y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相对近1年收波动率分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率分位数 = 当前收益率在近1年的同类收波动中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: VolatilityPercentile_2y
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: 当前波动率相对近2年收波动率分位数
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: 波动率分位数 = 当前收益率在近2年的同类收波动中的分位数
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: BBI
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: BBI 指标 (多空指标)
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: BBI = (MA3 + MA6 + MA12 + MA24) / 4
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: DMA
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: DMA 指标 (平均线差)
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: DMA = (MA短期 - MA长期) 的移动平均
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: DIF
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: MACD 指标的 DIF 值 (快线-趋势变化)
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: DIF = EMA(短期) - EMA(长期)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: DEA
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: MACD 指标的 DEA 值 (慢线-趋势平滑)
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: DEA = DIF 的指数移动平均值
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: MACD
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: MACD 值 (快线-慢线)
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: MACD = 2 (DIF - DEA)
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

not_executable_config_entries.name: ADXSlop-6
not_executable_config_entries.label_zh: ADX 的斜率
not_executable_config_entries.calculation: ADX 的斜率
not_executable_config_entries.reason: not wired by current public entrypoints

selection_rules.period_30d_35d_70d: executable but not in default period_list; pass explicitly
selection_rules.rolling_metric_subset: not supported by V1 job schema; leave selection.rolling_metrics null
selection_rules.same_day_signal: outputs dated t include t end-of-day inputs; shift features before same-day pre-close use
